name: FISERV INC
summary: Fiserv, Inc. is a leading global provider of payments and financial services technology solutions, serving merchants, banks, credit unions, financial institutions, and corporate clients. Key offerings include account processing, digital banking, card issuer processing, network services, e-commerce, merchant acquiring, and the Clover cloud-based POS and business management platform. In 2025, Fiserv reported $21.2 billion in total revenue, with 80% derived from processing and services fees under multi-year contracts.
